title: Improving Commonsense Question Answering by Graph-based Iterative Retrieval over Multiple Knowledge Sources
abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of multi-value property in knowledge graphs for commonsense question answering systems. The authors propose a novel method that uses graph-based iterative retrieval over multiple knowledge sources to improve performance.

components: Graph-based iterative retrieval module to narrow and refine knowledge facts
Multiple knowledge sources including Wikipedia, ConceptNet, and a dictionary

problem.name: Multi-value property of knowledge
problem.description: When multiple answer choices are related to the same entity-relation pair in knowledge graphs, making it difficult for systems to distinguish the correct answer

solution: Engaging multiple knowledge sources to establish precise connections between background knowledge and the original question and choices
